subject: feat(pdf): add Save as PDF button via window.print()
body:
Adds "Save as PDF" to the workspace actions menu (kebab dropdown + mobile
bottom sheet). Uses browser-native print dialog — zero dependencies, offline
support, searchable text output.

Hides interactive elements in print preview: app header, back navigation,
action buttons, transaction filters, and pagination. Adds print-color-adjust
to preserve badge/chart background colors.

Tags: pdf, ux, print, dashboard
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: download-pdf
Semver: minor
